vocab.meaning: tầm nhìn phong cảnh đẹp mắt
vocab.example: I always prioritize hotels that offer a scenic vista of the ocean to enhance my travel experience.

vocab.meaning: nơi trú ẩn yên tĩnh, thanh bình
vocab.example: A room with a balcony overlooking the forest serves as a tranquil sanctuary away from the tourist crowds.

vocab.meaning: có giá cao hơn bình thường
vocab.example: Although rooms with panoramic views command a premium, I believe the visual experience is worth the extra cost.

vocab.meaning: toàn cảnh đẹp đến nghẹt thở
vocab.example: Waking up to a breathtaking panorama of the city skyline is the highlight of any urban trip for me.
Staring at a serene landscape from my window helps me recharge my batteries after a long day of sightseeing.

vocab.meaning: sức hút về mặt thẩm mỹ
vocab.example: The aesthetic appeal of a room's surroundings significantly impacts my mood and overall satisfaction.

vocab.meaning: một yếu tố nền tảng/quan trọng
vocab.example: For many travelers, securing a room with a natural view is a foundational pillar of a successful vacation.

vocab.meaning: sự hối hả và nhộn nhịp
vocab.example: Having a high-floor room allows me to observe the hustle and bustle of the city from a peaceful distance.

vocab.meaning: tầm nhìn không bị che khuất
vocab.example: I specifically requested a suite that provides an uninterrupted view of the mountain range.

vocab.meaning: sự thấu cảm/hiểu biết tinh tế
vocab.example: Observing the local life from a balcony gives me a more nuanced understanding of the destination's daily rhythm.
